title: Wetsuit Drysuit Shampoo Cleaner for Marine Scuba Dive Gear - 10oz

aspects.California Prop 65 Warning: CALIFORNIA WARNING: This product can expose you to chemicals including bisphenol_a_(bpa), which is known to the State of California to cause cancer, birth defects or other reproductive harm. For more information, go to: www.P65Warnings.ca.gov
